0.details:
My friend getting married is a blessing and a change in your life
You are not a teen anymore, you are a woman, a wife to your husband, a soulmate to your husband Cherise what you have.
Remember you are one with your husband
0.model_generation:
Cherise, standing here today fills my heart with joy. Watching you step into this new chapter is a blessing that lights up every moment. You are not a teen anymore; you have grown into a confident woman, a devoted wife, and a soulmate. In marrying your husband, you have discovered a love that honors who you are and nurtures who you will become.

Today marks a beautiful change in your life—two paths merging into one shared journey. May you cherish each sunrise together, weaving laughter, trust, and compassion into every memory. Remember that you and your husband are one, bound by promises made and dreams yet to unfold.

As you embrace the adventures ahead, lean on each other’s strengths and offer grace in moments of challenge. May your partnership be a sacred space of understanding and support. Here’s to love’s endless blessings and to the life you will build together.
0.final_version:
Congratulations, my friend. Wow, it is your big day. I am full of emotions. My pillar is entering a adulthood, you are not a teen  anymore; your are a woman, a wife to your husband, and a soulmate. You taught me that strength doesn't always roar, sometimes quietness, steady and full of grace. You always tell me that when trouble comes find your inner peace. 

Remember that you are one with your husband. No more late night parties, no more sleepovers, my friend. Cherish the beauty of your marriage. I love and wish you a beautiful and blessed marriage. 

Much will change from this point forward. Life requires sacrifice, You will become a mother to someone. And definitely you are going to be a good, excellent mother. Do not be afraid, do not be discourage, and he to say that be satisfied with what you have, says the lord. Love is peace and beautiful.

1.details:
Big news, I recently started a new role.
it is more exciting as I have team members
Lots of reading contracts and meetings
Negotiating the clauses of the contract
It keep my brain sharp and more coffee intake
1.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I hope this letter finds you in good spirits. I wanted to share some exciting news: I’ve just started a new role as Senior Contract Specialist at White Oak Advisors. After years working independently, having a dedicated team to collaborate with feels incredibly energizing. Every day, I dive into lengthy contract drafts, attend strategy meetings, and negotiate critical clauses—no two hours are the same.

Balancing these intense sessions has definitely sharpened my problem-solving skills, though my coffee consumption has skyrocketed to keep pace with the fast run of deadlines. Outside work, I’ve been exploring local hiking trails on weekends to clear my head. I’d love to hear what’s new in your world—how’s your growing art collection coming along? Let’s schedule a coffee catch-up or a long phone chat soon.

I miss our conversations, and can’t wait to hear your news. Please give my regards to your family.

Warmly,
Jordan
1.final_version:
Hey Friend,

It is been way too long and I've been meaning to write to you for ages. Life has been moving fast, but i finally carved out a quiet moment and thought. 

Big News on my end, I have landed a new role as a contract manager. Its been a whirlwind, lots of legal contract to read, your know that is my favorite. Also part of my responsibility is to negotiate big contract. 

Honestly, I am having fun and loving it. Its the kind of the work that keeps my brain sharp with more coffee to drink. Friend, I miss you so much. I was reviewing a clause about force majeure, and it instantly reminded me of that time we tried to plan trip to camp at Limpopo got rained out. We called it an act of nature, but now i know the legal term of it. Who knew that soggy weekend would be a case law in the contract. 

Take care, love you always 
Ania

2.details:
Lets do things right, about growing, about showing up with integrity already sets you apart
Proof of your purpose
The resilient to keep going when on one is watching
Enjoy every moment of life
2.model_generation:
Every day, choose to do things right, even when no one is watching. That commitment to integrity defines your character and sets you apart. Growth isn’t always loud or celebrated; sometimes it’s the quiet progress you make in moments of doubt. Let your perseverance be proof of your purpose—keep pushing forward when the path feels steep. Remember, resilience isn’t about never stumbling; it’s about rising again with grace and conviction.

Celebrate each victory, no matter how small, and embrace every lesson along the way. Find joy in simple moments—sunlit mornings, unexpected laughter, and the hum of life all around you. These fragments of happiness remind you why you started and fuel your drive to keep going. Trust that every choice matters.

With every step taken with honesty and courage, you’re building a life you can be proud of. Keep showing up, keep growing, and savor each moment of this amazing journey.
2.final_version:
Every day, choose to do things right, even when no one is watching. That commitment to integrity defines your character and sets you apart. Growth isn’t always loud or celebrated; sometimes it’s the quiet progress you make in moments of doubt. Let your perseverance be proof of your purpose—keep pushing forward when the path feels steep. Remember, resilience isn’t about never stumbling; it’s about rising again with grace and conviction.

Celebrate each victory, no matter how small, and embrace every lesson along the way. Find joy in simple moments—sunlit mornings, unexpected laughter, and the hum of life all around you. These fragments of happiness remind you why you started and fuel your drive to keep going. Trust that every choice matters.

With every step taken with honesty and courage, you’re building a life you can be proud of. Keep showing up, keep growing, and savor each moment of this amazing journey. Whatever you're facing, you got this, you got the clarity, the discipline, the heart to meet it. And if you ever doubt that, just look back how you overcome all circumstances.

3.details:
My deepest condolence,
My friend, I am here always when you need me.
I always remember God is our strength and our provider
Wishing you peace and comfort during this difficult time
3.model_generation:
My dear friend,

I was heartbroken to hear about your loss. Please accept my deepest condolences during this painful time. I wish I could ease the ache you feel, but please know I am always here when you need me. May you feel God’s presence as our strength and provider, guiding you through each day and lifting your spirit when sorrow feels overwhelming. I will always remember the kindness and warmth they brought into our lives, and I hope those cherished memories bring you some comfort. Lean on those who care for you and remember that you are not alone. I pray for moments of peace to gently embrace your heart and ease the weight of grief. May fond memories bring you solace, and may the love of family and friends support you now and in the days ahead. Wishing you peace and comfort during this difficult time.

With love and sympathy,  
Your friend
3.final_version:
My dear friend,

I was heartbroken to hear about your loss. Please accept my deepest condolences during this painful time. I wish I could ease the ache you feel, but please know I am always here when you need me. May you feel God’s presence as our strength and provider, guiding you through each day and lifting your spirit when sorrow feels overwhelming. I will always remember the kindness and warmth they brought into our lives, and I hope those cherished memories bring you some comfort. Lean on those who care for you and remember that you are not alone. I pray for moments of peace to gently embrace your heart and ease the weight of grief. May fond memories bring you solace, and may the love of family and friends support you now and in the days ahead. Wishing you peace and comfort during this difficult time.

I cant imagine what you're going through, but I'm here with you always through prayers, please don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything. Whenever you want to talk. I am phone call away 

With love and sympathy,  
Your friend

4.details:
Thank you so much
It was exactly what I needed to lift my spirit
Words that i can never express
You truly toughed my heart, it reminded me how lucky we are to have a friend who brings warmth in my life
4.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

Thank you so much for the wonderful surprise you sent. It was exactly what I needed to lift my spirit after a challenging week, and your thoughtfulness means more to me than I can ever express. Every detail of your gift touched my heart, reminding me how lucky I am to have someone who brings such warmth and joy into my life. Your kindness inspired me to look on the bright side and remember all the reasons I have to be grateful. Moments like these show me that true friendship isn’t about grand gestures alone but about understanding each other’s needs and simply being there when it matters most. I will treasure your gift as a symbol of our bond and carry its warmth with me wherever I go. I look forward to creating many more memories together and hope to share as much happiness with you as you have shared with me. 

With heartfelt gratitude,
4.final_version:

You're always had such a gift for noticing when people need a car, and this time was special. you truly toughed my heart. it reminded me how lucky we are to have a friend who brings so much warmth and light into our lives.

With heartfelt gratitude,

5.details:
my apologies, I am truly sorry
I realized that i spoke without thinking
my words ended up hurts you, that was not my intention, but i can see now how careless I was.
5.model_generation:
Hello,

I am writing to sincerely apologize for the words I spoke without thinking the other day. I realize now how much my careless comments hurt you, and I am truly sorry for the pain I caused. It was never my intention to upset you, and looking back I can see how thoughtless I was. You deserve better respect and consideration than I showed, and I deeply regret letting my frustration get the best of me.

Please know that I value our relationship more than anything and the trust we share. I am committed to being more mindful of my words in the future and to listening before I speak. Thank you for your patience and understanding as I work to improve. I hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me, and I promise to learn from this mistake. I appreciate you taking the time to read this.

Sincerely,
5.final_version:
Hello,

I am writing to sincerely apologize for the words I spoke without thinking the other day. I realize now how much my careless comments hurt you, and I am truly sorry for the pain I caused. It was never my intention to upset you, and looking back I can see how thoughtless I was. You deserve better respect and consideration than I showed, and I deeply regret letting my frustration get the best of me.

Please know that I value our relationship more than anything and the trust we share. I am committed to being more mindful of my words in the future and to listening before I speak. Thank you for your patience and understanding as I work to improve. I hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me, and I promise to learn from this mistake. I appreciate you taking the time to read this.

If you're open to it. I'd love to meet for a coffee or walk sometime soon no pressure just a chance to talk things through.

Thank you for hearing me out and for being someone whose is willing, I deeply cherish.

Sincerely,

post_survey.feedback: I have enjoyed the study, it indicates that AI is dominating. The learning was how critical you writing style is. And time consuming, while AI can do it instantly.
